abstract:
Artificial Intelligence Quotient (AIQ): A Novel Framework for Measuring Human-AI
Collaborative Intelligence
Venkat Ram Reddy Ganuthula1 Krishna Kumar Balaraman1
1 Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur
Abstract
As artificial intelligence becomes increasingly integrated into professional and personal domains,
traditional metrics of human intelligence require reconceptualization. This paper introduces the
Artificial Intelligence Quotient (AIQ), a novel measurement framework designed to assess an
